cards.title: Repo setup & scaffold
cards.description: Initialize repo structure, README, docs, dashboard skeleton.

cards.title: Vercel deploy readiness
cards.description: Verify dashboard builds cleanly. Connect to Vercel project. Set root directory to dashboard/. Test preview deploy.

cards.title: GitHub public push readiness
cards.description: Audit repo for secrets. Add .gitignore entries for .env.local. Create remote. Push. Set visibility to public.

cards.title: First experiment design: temperature per task type
cards.description: Based on IDEA-001. Design a parameter grid for temperature (0, 0.3, 0.7, 1.0, 1.5) across 3 task types (code, creative, extraction). Define rubric.

cards.title: Symphony research: existing tools
cards.description: Research whether Optuna, Ray Tune, or similar tools could serve as Symphony's optimization backend. Document findings in docs/.

cards.title: OpenAI accepted PR scan
cards.description: Scan OpenAI API changelog and public PRs (openai-python, openai-node) for parameter-related changes. Document findings in ideas/.

cards.title: Idea ranking: prioritize top 3 for first experiments
cards.description: Review /ideas/index.md. Score all ideas. Move top 3 to experiment design phase.

cards.title: Build experiment runner script (T1)
cards.description: Implement agents/run.js for T1 (Experiment Runner). Must include cost guard. Read design from design.md, write to results/.

cards.title: Dashboard: connect to live board data
cards.description: Dashboard currently shows static data. Wire up /api/board route to read board/backlog.json. Reflect real card state.

cards.title: Symphony: decide Hypothesis A vs B vs C
cards.description: Review SYMPHONY.md hypotheses. Make a call on which to prototype first. Write decision to docs/symphony-decision.md.
